hypothesis: Integrating a persistent, graph-structured memory that encodes a force-field ontology, standard cutoff/charge heuristics, and episodic traces of prior runs into the multi-agent framework will increase the median IoU of literature-extracted parameters on papers with unconventional table layouts to ≥0.98 and raise the correct-setup rate for three-adsorbate, multi-structure isotherm and HOA benchmarks to ≥95% relative to an otherwise identical stateless baseline.
